verse.name: V1
verse.lines: The trial of this world was getting closer, The pull I felt was more than I could bear; When I was on the verge of giving over, The strength within myself just wasn't there.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Something keeps holding me, Everyday I see; He's helping me faithfully To overcome my trials. Guiding me constantly, Giving me victory; He's a reality, 'cause Something keeps holding me.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Satan laid before me his temptation, Of his desire to steal away my faith; But I have found inside the revelation, The strength I need to keep me in His grace.
